allowed_fixes: implementation defects that do not change the fixed economic rule or gates
development_gate: base compounded return > 0; at least two positive calendar years; max-drawdown magnitude <= 80% of buy-and-hold; Calmar > buy-and-hold
holdout_release_rule: Fetch and analyze 2024-2025 only after development passes; fetch and analyze 2026H1 only after fixed evaluation; otherwise stop

known_exposure.2021_2023: Underlying ETHUSDT prices were exposed by the prior 2h reversal development study; this rule has not been calculated
known_exposure.2024_2026h1: No ETHUSDT archives or outcomes downloaded or viewed

question: Can a fixed ETHUSDT daily SMA200 long/cash rule deliver positive compounded returns and materially lower drawdown than continuous 1x perpetual exposure after actual funding proxy and 32 bp round trips?

rule.execution: use prior UTC close signal for next UTC day position
